description_long: This is a large, multi-winged residential house complex surrounded by a perimeter wall and lush landscaping, including several trees and palm trees. The structure features multiple pitched, brown-tiled roofs at varying heights, with a combination of single and double-story sections. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely stucco or painted masonry, and the windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns across the facades. A driveway leads to the main entrance, and there is a visible backyard area with a swimming pool and patio. The property is set within a well-defined lot, giving it a suburban estate appearance.
description: A spacious, multi-winged suburban house with brown-tiled roofs, light exterior walls, landscaped grounds, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from the side, highlighting the backyard pool, patio area, and a row of trees along the property edge.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the house from the driveway approach, emphasizing the main entrance, driveway, and front landscaping.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear and side of the house, with a clear view of the multiple rooflines and the tree-lined property boundary.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a perspective from the opposite side, showing the pool area, side wings, and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of small and medium-sized windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with columns, a prominent front door, and a paved driveway approach.
